title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
